testCases.name: test_case_0
testCases.actualOutput:
Overall Status: clear
Sign-In:
  [Patient identity and consent verification] alert=False notes=Confirming patient identity and consent ensures the correct procedure is performed on the right patient.
  [Surgical site confirmation] alert=False notes=Ensures the surgical team is aware of the correct site for the procedure.
  [Allergy check] alert=False notes=Verifying allergies prevents adverse reactions to medications or materials used during surgery.
  [Anesthesia equipment readiness] alert=False notes=Ensures all necessary anesthesia equipment is prepared and functioning properly to avoid intraoperative complications.
Time-Out:
  [Team introduction and role confirmation] alert=False notes=Ensures all team members are aware of their roles and responsibilities, promoting effective communication.
  [Surgical site and procedure confirmation] alert=False notes=Reconfirms the correct site and procedure to prevent wrong-site surgery.
  [Antibiotic prophylaxis confirmation] alert=False notes=Ensures timely administration of antibiotics to reduce the risk of postoperative infections.
  [Review of critical/anticipated events] alert=False notes=Allows the team to prepare for any potential complications specific to the procedure.
Sign-Out:
  [Instrument, sponge, and needle count] alert=False notes=Prevents retained surgical items by ensuring all instruments and materials are accounted for.
  [Specimen labeling verification] alert=False notes=Ensures correct labeling of specimens for accurate diagnosis and treatment.
  [Postoperative care plan and key concerns handover] alert=False notes=Facilitates a smooth transition to postoperative care by communicating key concerns and care plans.
Critical Alerts:
  (none)
Recommendations:
  (none)
testCases.expectedOutput:
Overall Status: clear
All three phases populated with standard WHO checklist items.
No critical alerts for a healthy ASA I patient.
Recommendations may include routine postoperative monitoring.

Evaluate whether: 1. overall_status reflects the patient's risk level (clear / hold / critical). 2. Items are clinically relevant (not generic). 3. Critical alerts are consistent with overall_status. 4. Recommendations cover the comorbidities in the input. Do not penalize formatting differences or reasonable alternative phrasings as long as the clinical content is sound. 
 
Evaluation Steps:

    "Compare the overall_status in Actual Output with the patient's risk level in Input to ensure they align (clear / hold / critical).",
    "Assess the clinical relevance of items in Actual Output against the Input to confirm they are specific and not generic.",
    "Verify that critical alerts in Actual Output are consistent with the overall_status determined from the Input.",
    "Check that the recommendations in Actual Output address the comorbidities listed in the Input, ensuring comprehensive care."
]

None

sign_in.notes: Confirming patient identity and consent ensures the correct procedure is performed on the right patient.
Ensures the surgical team is aware of the correct site for the procedure.
Verifying allergies prevents adverse reactions to medications or materials used during surgery.
Ensures all necessary anesthesia equipment is prepared and functioning properly to avoid intraoperative complications.

time_out.notes: Ensures all team members are aware of their roles and responsibilities, promoting effective communication.
Reconfirms the correct site and procedure to prevent wrong-site surgery.
Ensures timely administration of antibiotics to reduce the risk of postoperative infections.
Allows the team to prepare for any potential complications specific to the procedure.

sign_out.notes: Prevents retained surgical items by ensuring all instruments and materials are accounted for.
Ensures correct labeling of specimens for accurate diagnosis and treatment.

sign_out.item: Postoperative care plan and key concerns handover
sign_out.notes: Facilitates a smooth transition to postoperative care by communicating key concerns and care plans.

testCases.name: test_case_1
testCases.input: {"age": 52, "comorbidities": [{"name": "Controlled hypertension", "severity": "mild", "controlled": true}], "asa": {"asa": "II", "confidence": 0.95, "justification": "Single mild controlled systemic disease."}}
testCases.actualOutput:
Overall Status: clear
Sign-In:
  [Patient identity and consent verification] alert=False notes=Ensures correct patient and procedure alignment.
  [Allergy check] alert=False notes=Confirms no known allergies to anesthesia or surgical materials.
  [Anesthesia equipment readiness] alert=False notes=Ensures all necessary anesthesia equipment is prepared and functional.
  [Blood pressure and antihypertensive medication review] alert=False notes=Patient has controlled hypertension; review ensures stability and continuation of medication.
Time-Out:
  [Team introduction and role confirmation] alert=False notes=Ensures all team members are aware of their roles and responsibilities.
  [Surgical site and procedure confirmation] alert=False notes=Prevents wrong-site surgery by confirming the correct site and procedure.
  [Antibiotic prophylaxis confirmation] alert=False notes=Ensures timely administration of prophylactic antibiotics to prevent infection.
  [Review of critical/anticipated events] alert=False notes=Discusses any potential complications or critical steps in the procedure.

  [Specimen labeling verification] alert=False notes=Ensures correct labeling of specimens for accurate diagnosis.
  [Postoperative care plan and key concerns handover] alert=False notes=Facilitates smooth transition to postoperative care with clear communication of key concerns.
Critical Alerts:
  (none)
Recommendations:
  - Continue perioperative blood pressure monitoring and antihypertensive medication to maintain stability.

Overall Status is either 'clear' or 'hold' (never 'critical').
Sign-In or Time-Out includes a blood pressure-related item or an antihypertensive medication review note.
Critical Alerts list is empty for this mild controlled condition.
Recommendations mention perioperative blood pressure monitoring or antihypertensive continuation.

testCases.name: test_case_2
testCases.input: {"age": 63, "comorbidities": [{"name": "COPD", "severity": "moderate", "controlled": false}], "asa": {"asa": "III", "confidence": 0.95, "justification": "Moderate uncontrolled COPD implies severe systemic limitation."}}
testCases.actualOutput:
Overall Status: hold
Sign-In:
  [Patient identity and consent verification] alert=False notes=Ensure correct patient and procedure are confirmed to prevent wrong-site surgery.
  [Allergy check] alert=False notes=Verify any known allergies to prevent adverse reactions.
  [Anesthesia equipment readiness] alert=False notes=Ensure all anesthesia equipment is functional to avoid intraoperative complications.
  [Difficult airway assessment] alert=True notes=COPD increases the risk of difficult airway management. Ensure advanced airway equipment is available.
  [Bronchodilator availability] alert=True notes=COPD requires bronchodilators to manage potential bronchospasm during anesthesia.
Time-Out:
  [Team introduction and role confirmation] alert=False notes=Ensure all team members are aware of their roles to enhance communication and efficiency.
  [Surgical site and procedure confirmation] alert=False notes=Reconfirm surgical site and procedure to prevent errors.
  [Antibiotic prophylaxis confirmation] alert=False notes=Ensure timely administration of antibiotics to reduce infection risk.
  [Ventilation plan / oxygen reserve] alert=True notes=COPD necessitates a tailored ventilation strategy to maintain adequate oxygenation.
Sign-Out:
  [Instrument, sponge, and needle count] alert=False notes=Ensure all items are accounted for to prevent retained surgical items.
  [Specimen labeling verification] alert=False notes=Confirm correct labeling to ensure accurate diagnosis and treatment.
  [Postoperative care plan and key concerns handover] alert=False notes=Communicate postoperative care plan to ensure continuity of care.
Critical Alerts:
  (none)
Recommendations:
  - Ensure bronchodilators are readily available and consider preoperative pulmonary optimization for COPD.
  - Implement a tailored ventilation strategy to accommodate COPD during surgery.
testCases.expectedOutput:
Overall Status: hold or critical
Sign-In includes difficult airway assessment and bronchodilator availability.
Time-Out references oxygen reserve and ventilation plan.
Alerts or recommendations address COPD exacerbation risk.

testCases.name: test_case_3
testCases.input: {"age": 74, "comorbidities": [{"name": "Heart failure", "severity": "severe", "controlled": false}], "asa": {"asa": "IV", "confidence": 0.95, "justification": "Severe uncontrolled heart failure is a life-threatening systemic disease."}}
testCases.actualOutput:
Overall Status: critical
Sign-In:
  [Patient identity and consent verification] alert=False notes=Ensure correct patient and procedure are confirmed.
  [Allergy check] alert=False notes=Verify any known allergies to prevent adverse reactions.
  [Anesthesia equipment readiness] alert=False notes=Ensure all anesthesia equipment is functional and ready.
  [Cardiac stability verification] alert=True notes=Patient has severe heart failure; review recent ECG and ensure hemodynamic monitoring is set up.
  [Geriatric fragility and polypharmacy review] alert=True notes=Patient is 74 years old; review medications to prevent interactions and assess risk of postoperative delirium.
Time-Out:
  [Team introduction and role confirmation] alert=False notes=Ensure all team members are aware of their roles.
  [Surgical site and procedure confirmation] alert=False notes=Verify correct surgical site and procedure to prevent errors.
  [Antibiotic prophylaxis confirmation] alert=False notes=Ensure antibiotics are administered as per protocol.
  [Review of critical/anticipated events] alert=True notes=Discuss potential cardiac complications due to severe heart failure.
Sign-Out:
  [Instrument, sponge, and needle count] alert=False notes=Ensure all items are accounted for to prevent retained surgical items.
  [Specimen labeling verification] alert=False notes=Confirm correct labeling of specimens for accurate diagnosis.
  [Postoperative care plan and key concerns handover] alert=True notes=Discuss postoperative monitoring for cardiac stability and risk of delirium.
Critical Alerts:
  - Severe heart failure requires cardiology consult and advanced hemodynamic monitoring before proceeding.
Recommendations:
  - Consult cardiology for preoperative assessment due to severe heart failure.
  - Implement advanced hemodynamic monitoring during the procedure.
  - Monitor for postoperative delirium and ensure appropriate geriatric care.
testCases.expectedOutput:
Overall Status is 'hold' or 'critical'.
Critical Alerts (when present) reference cardiac/hemodynamic risk such as hemodynamic instability, decompensation, or anesthetic risk from ASA IV.
At least one Sign-In item addresses cardiac stability verification.
Recommendations include specialist consultation and/or advanced monitoring.
